best_unix_strategy: Use a range-aware text script to identify the exact `### Delivery Receipt Verification` subsection under `## Intake`, capture through the line before the next peer `###` heading, delete that source range, and insert the captured block immediately before `### Customer Handoff` under `## Completion` while leaving the decoy subsection and quoted archive mention untouched.
rationale: The measured hybrid-minus-unix gap is 0pp because both hybrid and unix failed under both scorers. Hybrid moved the target block but dropped the `### Archive` heading near the decoy/archive region; unix failed to complete the move and left the source heading under `## Intake`. Since the tool-enabled hybrid cell did not pass, this is not a promotable AST-structural gap even though mdtools-only passed.
